description: Snov.io is an outreach platform that finds and verifies emails, runs automated email and LinkedIn sequences, and tracks deals in a built-in sales CRM.
overview: Snov.io pairs an email finder and verifier with multichannel drip campaigns and a lightweight CRM, so teams can build lists and run cold outreach from one place.
what_is: Snov.io bundles the pieces of a cold outreach motion into one tool: finding prospect emails, verifying them, sending automated email and LinkedIn sequences, and tracking the resulting deals in a built-in CRM. The idea is to run campaigns without stitching several apps together.

It works well for startups, agencies, and sales teams that want to generate leads, send personalized sequences, and manage a pipeline without much overhead. Lists and campaigns come together quickly, which keeps the time from setup to first sends short.

Snov.io connects to popular CRMs and email providers and exposes an API for your wider stack. It is not trying to be an enterprise CRM or a full marketing suite; it concentrates on lead enrichment, multichannel outreach, and basic deal tracking.
